channel.title: Meta on j4xx3n
channel.description: Recent content in Meta on j4xx3n

item.title: Welcome to the Cybersecurity Section
item.description:
This section covers topics in cybersecurity — from fundamentals to hands-on write-ups.

What I’ll cover here

  • CTF write-ups and challenge breakdowns
  • Tool deep-dives and techniques
  • Notes from certs and courses
  • Security concepts explained

More articles coming soon.

item.title: Hello World
item.description:
This is my first blog post. I write here about things I find interesting.

Why I started this blog

I wanted a place to document my thoughts and projects without the noise of social media.

What to expect

  • Technical write-ups on things I build
  • Notes from books and courses I work through
  • Occasional personal reflections

Stay tuned.
